rag_rules: Fix unresolved references or invalid expressions in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible and properly typed.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE annexes to avoid '<error>' type issues.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are resolvable within the current scope.
Validate that expression types match between left and right sides of binary operations in AGREE guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and placed in appropriate component scopes.
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for constants and equation declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model's configured dependencies.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes; use implementation scopes instead.
